records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That concludes the report on the Qliphoth Game, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That concludes the report on the Qliphoth Game, Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work. Now that I've heard the full story, I can see why we were urgently called in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work. Now that I've heard the full story, I can see why we were urgently called in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work. Now that I've heard the full story, I can see why we were urgently called in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's Dame Esterosa's condition?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's Dame Esterosa's condition?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's Dame Esterosa's condition?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She remains in the same spot, head bowed, completely still.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She remains in the same spot, head bowed, completely still.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She remains in the same spot, head bowed, completely still.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems Professor Birmingham's death was a severe shock to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems Professor Birmingham's death was a severe shock to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems Professor Birmingham's death was a severe shock to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course it was. After all, he was the one who sponsored her entry into the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course it was. After all, he was the one who sponsored her entry into the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course it was. After all, he was the one who sponsored her entry into the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't blame her for how she feels... but defying the Elder Council's decision?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't blame her for how she feels... but defying the Elder Council's decision?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't blame her for how she feels... but defying the Elder Council's decision?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with some justification, this time, that was a reckless move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with some justification, this time, that was a reckless move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with some justification, this time, that was a reckless move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... You've been standing there awfully stiff. Did I make you uncomfortable somehow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... You've been standing there awfully stiff. Did I make you uncomfortable somehow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... You've been standing there awfully stiff. Did I make you uncomfortable somehow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I say something wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I say something wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I say something wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, ma'am! It's just... As a knight who follows the stars, I'm honored to meet someone from the previous generation...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, ma'am! It's just... As a knight who follows the stars, I'm honored to meet someone from the previous generation...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, ma'am! It's just... As a knight who follows the stars, I'm honored to meet someone from the previous generation...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though its significance may have been tarnished by the former commander, were not the previous generation hailed as an unparalleled golden generation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though its significance may have been tarnished by the former commander, were not the previous generation hailed as an unparalleled golden generation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though its significance may have been tarnished by the former commander, were not the previous generation hailed as an unparalleled golden generation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And meeting the Knight of Aries herself... Dame Medea, it's an honor, despite the circumstances!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And meeting the Knight of Aries herself... Dame Medea, it's an honor, despite the circumstances!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And meeting the Knight of Aries herself... Dame Medea, it's an honor, despite the circumstances!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You flatter me. I may still hold the Armament due to family ties, but the current Knight of Aries is Hansol, not me.94p94p94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: You flatter me. I may still hold the Armament due to family ties, but the current Knight of Aries is Hansol, not me.94p94p94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: You flatter me. I may still hold the Armament due to family ties, but the current Knight of Aries is Hansol, not me.94p94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please keep that in mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please keep that in mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please keep that in mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood! I'll be careful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood! I'll be careful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood! I'll be careful!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... Well then, if you don't mind, please lead the way to the site.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... Well then, if you don't mind, please lead the way to the site.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... Well then, if you don't mind, please lead the way to the site.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allen Birmingham... the tactics instructor from Counter Academy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allen Birmingham... the tactics instructor from Counter Academy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allen Birmingham... the tactics instructor from Counter Academy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even back then, his interest extended beyond Counter tactics, being deeply invested in researching the Star Armaments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even back then, his interest extended beyond Counter tactics, being deeply invested in researching the Star Armaments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even back then, his interest extended beyond Counter tactics, being deeply invested in researching the Star Armaments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If he aided the knights with ill intent, the timeline fits. Their techniques were suspiciously similar to ours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If he aided the knights with ill intent, the timeline fits. Their techniques were suspiciously similar to ours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If he aided the knights with ill intent, the timeline fits. Their techniques were suspiciously similar to ours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The problem is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The problem is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The problem is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That their Armaments surpass even the Administration's technology, despite appearances.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That their Armaments surpass even the Administration's technology, despite appearances.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That their Armaments surpass even the Administration's technology, despite appearances.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means the Demon Lord's Apostle had no need to keep up a messy alliance with the Zodiac Knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means the Demon Lord's Apostle had no need to keep up a messy alliance with the Zodiac Knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means the Demon Lord's Apostle had no need to keep up a messy alliance with the Zodiac Knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't you agree, Dame Medea?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't you agree, Dame Medea?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't you agree, Dame Medea?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Chief. It's been a while. Have you been well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Chief. It's been a while. Have you been well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Chief. It's been a while. Have you been well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Last I heard, the Institution was serving the President of the States. I didn't expect to see you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Last I heard, the Institution was serving the President of the States. I didn't expect to see you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Last I heard, the Institution was serving the President of the States. I didn't expect to see you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Under normal circumstances, our agents would have been enough. But operation code <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Strike</color> was activated...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Under normal circumstances, our agents would have been enough. But operation code <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Strike</color> was activated...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Under normal circumstances, our agents would have been enough. But operation code <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Strike</color> was activated...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It became the perfect opportunity to gauge the strength of our future enemies. That was a reason enough for me to come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It became the perfect opportunity to gauge the strength of our future enemies. That was a reason enough for me to come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It became the perfect opportunity to gauge the strength of our future enemies. That was a reason enough for me to come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... You're as dutiful as ever. I feel ashamed for standing on the sidelines.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... You're as dutiful as ever. I feel ashamed for standing on the sidelines.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... You're as dutiful as ever. I feel ashamed for standing on the sidelines.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're too modest. As someone effectively retired, no one would've blamed you for not deploying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're too modest. As someone effectively retired, no one would've blamed you for not deploying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're too modest. As someone effectively retired, no one would've blamed you for not deploying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, you're here. Likely because you were concerned for your successors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, you're here. Likely because you were concerned for your successors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, you're here. Likely because you were concerned for your successors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though the former commander, kin to the current one, has disappeared without leaving a trace..
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though the former commander, kin to the current one, has disappeared without leaving a trace..
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though the former commander, kin to the current one, has disappeared without leaving a trace..

records.m_Talk_ENG: The previous generation of knights were proud warriors who fought for honor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The previous generation of knights were proud warriors who fought for honor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The previous generation of knights were proud warriors who fought for honor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Elizabeth! Where did you disappear to?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Elizabeth! Where did you disappear to?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Elizabeth! Where did you disappear to?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
How many times have I told you that we need to handle the cleanup now that the situation's
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
How many times have I told you that we need to handle the cleanup now that the situation's
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
How many times have I told you that we need to handle the cleanup now that the situation's
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me. Seems we've got some interference on the line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me. Seems we've got some interference on the line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me. Seems we've got some interference on the line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here I was, enjoying a rare, cultured conversation, when...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here I was, enjoying a rare, cultured conversation, when...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here I was, enjoying a rare, cultured conversation, when...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, a shame. Looks like we'll have to postpone tea time for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, a shame. Looks like we'll have to postpone tea time for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, a shame. Looks like we'll have to postpone tea time for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would it be all right if I asked you to share what's happening on the ground?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would it be all right if I asked you to share what's happening on the ground?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would it be all right if I asked you to share what's happening on the ground?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. This is what we've learned thanks to the support of the deployed TASKFORCEs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. This is what we've learned thanks to the support of the deployed TASKFORCEs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. This is what we've learned thanks to the support of the deployed TASKFORCEs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Contrary to predictions that the Sanctuary would vanish with the Demon Lord's death...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Contrary to predictions that the Sanctuary would vanish with the Demon Lord's death...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Contrary to predictions that the Sanctuary would vanish with the Demon Lord's death...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their remnants, including their Unique Gear, are still present.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their remnants, including their Unique Gear, are still present.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their remnants, including their Unique Gear, are still present.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a stark contrast to the Doppelganger-type C.O., which has completely disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a stark contrast to the Doppelganger-type C.O., which has completely disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a stark contrast to the Doppelganger-type C.O., which has completely disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw it on the live broadcast. Their Unique Gear closely resembled those of our Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw it on the live broadcast. Their Unique Gear closely resembled those of our Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw it on the live broadcast. Their Unique Gear closely resembled those of our Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd like to examine them... Do we know what became of the Armaments?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd like to examine them... Do we know what became of the Armaments?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd like to examine them... Do we know what became of the Armaments?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, the Administration has secured them. So immediate access isn't possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, the Administration has secured them. So immediate access isn't possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, the Administration has secured them. So immediate access isn't possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And worse, some of them are currently unaccounted for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And worse, some of them are currently unaccounted for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And worse, some of them are currently unaccounted for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean the Armaments have gone missing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean the Armaments have gone missing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean the Armaments have gone missing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The few that remain are notable, but others may have vanished. Some say it's due to the Demon Lord's death...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The few that remain are notable, but others may have vanished. Some say it's due to the Demon Lord's death...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The few that remain are notable, but others may have vanished. Some say it's due to the Demon Lord's death...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as someone who's been in the Institution for years, I can tell you this much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as someone who's been in the Institution for years, I can tell you this much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as someone who's been in the Institution for years, I can tell you this much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The powers wielded by the Demon Lord and Apostles are not to be underestimated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The powers wielded by the Demon Lord and Apostles are not to be underestimated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The powers wielded by the Demon Lord and Apostles are not to be underestimated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a small chance that within their ranks...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a small chance that within their ranks...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a small chance that within their ranks...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, that nag's blowing up my comms again. I can't hear myself think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, that nag's blowing up my comms again. I can't hear myself think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, that nag's blowing up my comms again. I can't hear myself think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, but may I have the rest relayed through my agents?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, but may I have the rest relayed through my agents?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, but may I have the rest relayed through my agents?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Thank you for your time, especially with everything going on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Thank you for your time, especially with everything going on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Thank you for your time, especially with everything going on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the knights learn anything new, we'll share it with the Institution as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the knights learn anything new, we'll share it with the Institution as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the knights learn anything new, we'll share it with the Institution as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Then I'll excuse myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Then I'll excuse myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Then I'll excuse myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please give my regards to the other knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please give my regards to the other knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please give my regards to the other knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keeping a straight face takes effort. Dealing with high-ranking officials is such a chore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keeping a straight face takes effort. Dealing with high-ranking officials is such a chore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keeping a straight face takes effort. Dealing with high-ranking officials is such a chore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bringing up old memories in a situation like this. Even if it wasn't intentional, it's a bit cruel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bringing up old memories in a situation like this. Even if it wasn't intentional, it's a bit cruel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bringing up old memories in a situation like this. Even if it wasn't intentional, it's a bit cruel.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights in battle. And now the Armaments have gone missing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights in battle. And now the Armaments have gone missing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should return to HQ.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I should return to HQ.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Elizabeth! Where did you disappear to?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Elizabeth! Where did you disappear to?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Elizabeth! Where did you disappear to?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
How many times have I told you that we need to handle the cleanup now that the situation's
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
How many times have I told you that we need to handle the cleanup now that the situation's
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
How many times have I told you that we need to handle the cleanup now that the situation's
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me. Seems we've got some interference on the line.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me. Seems we've got some interference on the line.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me. Seems we've got some interference on the line.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here I was, enjoying a rare, cultured conversation, when...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here I was, enjoying a rare, cultured conversation, when...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here I was, enjoying a rare, cultured conversation, when...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, a shame. Looks like we'll have to postpone tea time for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, a shame. Looks like we'll have to postpone tea time for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, a shame. Looks like we'll have to postpone tea time for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would it be all right if I asked you to share what's happening on the ground?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would it be all right if I asked you to share what's happening on the ground?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would it be all right if I asked you to share what's happening on the ground?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. This is what we've learned thanks to the support of the deployed TASKFORCEs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. This is what we've learned thanks to the support of the deployed TASKFORCEs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. This is what we've learned thanks to the support of the deployed TASKFORCEs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Contrary to predictions that the Sanctuary would vanish with the Demon Lord's death...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Contrary to predictions that the Sanctuary would vanish with the Demon Lord's death...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Contrary to predictions that the Sanctuary would vanish with the Demon Lord's death...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Their remnants, including their Unique Gear, are still present.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Their remnants, including their Unique Gear, are still present.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Their remnants, including their Unique Gear, are still present.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a stark contrast to the Doppelganger-type C.O., which has completely disappeared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a stark contrast to the Doppelganger-type C.O., which has completely disappeared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a stark contrast to the Doppelganger-type C.O., which has completely disappeared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I saw it on the live broadcast. Their Unique Gear closely resembled those of our Order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I saw it on the live broadcast. Their Unique Gear closely resembled those of our Order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw it on the live broadcast. Their Unique Gear closely resembled those of our Order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd like to examine them... Do we know what became of the Armaments?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd like to examine them... Do we know what became of the Armaments?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd like to examine them... Do we know what became of the Armaments?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, the Administration has secured them. So immediate access isn't possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, the Administration has secured them. So immediate access isn't possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, the Administration has secured them. So immediate access isn't possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And worse, some of them are currently unaccounted for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And worse, some of them are currently unaccounted for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And worse, some of them are currently unaccounted for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mean the Armaments have gone missing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mean the Armaments have gone missing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mean the Armaments have gone missing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The few that remain are notable, but others may have vanished. Some say it's due to the Demon Lord's death...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The few that remain are notable, but others may have vanished. Some say it's due to the Demon Lord's death...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The few that remain are notable, but others may have vanished. Some say it's due to the Demon Lord's death...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as someone who's been in the Institution for years, I can tell you this much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as someone who's been in the Institution for years, I can tell you this much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as someone who's been in the Institution for years, I can tell you this much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The powers wielded by the Demon Lord and Apostles are not to be underestimated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The powers wielded by the Demon Lord and Apostles are not to be underestimated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The powers wielded by the Demon Lord and Apostles are not to be underestimated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a small chance that within their ranks...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a small chance that within their ranks...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a small chance that within their ranks...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, that nag's blowing up my comms again. I can't hear myself think.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, that nag's blowing up my comms again. I can't hear myself think.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, that nag's blowing up my comms again. I can't hear myself think.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, but may I have the rest relayed through my agents?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, but may I have the rest relayed through my agents?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, but may I have the rest relayed through my agents?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Thank you for your time, especially with everything going on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Thank you for your time, especially with everything going on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Thank you for your time, especially with everything going on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the knights learn anything new, we'll share it with the Institution as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the knights learn anything new, we'll share it with the Institution as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the knights learn anything new, we'll share it with the Institution as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Then I'll excuse myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Then I'll excuse myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Then I'll excuse myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please give my regards to the other knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please give my regards to the other knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please give my regards to the other knights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keeping a straight face takes effort. Dealing with high-ranking officials is such a chore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keeping a straight face takes effort. Dealing with high-ranking officials is such a chore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keeping a straight face takes effort. Dealing with high-ranking officials is such a chore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bringing up old memories in a situation like this. Even if it wasn't intentional, it's a bit cruel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bringing up old memories in a situation like this. Even if it wasn't intentional, it's a bit cruel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bringing up old memories in a situation like this. Even if it wasn't intentional, it's a bit cruel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knights in battle. And now the Armaments have gone missing...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knights in battle. And now the Armaments have gone missing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knights in battle. And now the Armaments have gone missing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I should return to HQ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I should return to HQ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I should return to HQ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just in case... I should pay a visit to His Holiness, the Bishop.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just in case... I should pay a visit to His Holiness, the Bishop.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just in case... I should pay a visit to His Holiness, the Bishop.
